assertions.title: MACRS 150DB HY tables must sum to 100%
assertions.description: Each life in the 150DB half-year table must have percentages summing to 1.0 (Â±0.002). Failure means assets won't fully depreciate.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 30 2026 â€” ALL 150DB tables only recovered 87-90%, never implemented SL switchover

assertions.title: MACRS 200DB HY tables must sum to 100%
assertions.description: Each life in the 200DB half-year table must have percentages summing to 1.0 (Â±0.002).

assertions.title: 150DB HY table length = life + 1
assertions.description: Half-year convention adds one partial year. A 5yr table must have 6 entries, 7yr must have 8, etc.

assertions.title: 200DB HY table length = life + 1
assertions.description: Half-year convention adds one partial year.

assertions.title: K9 (Section 1231 gain) must appear in M2_3a formula
assertions.description: Schedule K Line 9 flows to M-2 Line 3a (Other additions to AAA). Without this, capital gains from asset dispositions don't affect retained earnings.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 29 2026 â€” capital gains not flowing to M-2

assertions.title: K2 (rental income) must appear in M2_3a formula
assertions.description: Net rental real estate income from K2 must flow to M-2 Line 3a.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 29 2026 â€” M-2 only had K1, missing all other K income items

assertions.title: K7 (ST capital gain) must appear in M2_3a formula
assertions.description: Short-term capital gains from K7 must flow to M-2 Line 3a.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 29 2026 â€” M-2 missing all non-ordinary K income

assertions.title: K8a (LT capital gain) must appear in M2_3a formula
assertions.description: Long-term capital gains from K8a must flow to M-2 Line 3a.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 29 2026 â€” M-2 missing all non-ordinary K income

assertions.title: K16a (tax-exempt income) must appear in M2_3a formula
assertions.description: Tax-exempt interest from K16a increases AAA via M-2 Line 3a.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 29 2026 â€” M-2 missing tax-exempt income

assertions.title: K15a must map to K-1 Box 15 Code A
assertions.description: Post-1986 depreciation adjustment (ongoing) must flow to shareholder K-1 Box 15 with Code A.

assertions.title: K15b must map to K-1 Box 15 Code B
assertions.description: Adjusted gain or loss (disposition AMT) must flow to K-1 Box 15 with Code B.
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 30 2026 â€” disposition AMT was going to K15a instead of K15b

assertions.title: M-2 ending balances must equal L24d (retained earnings)
assertions.description: L24d = M2_8a + M2_8b + M2_8c + M2_8d. If these don't match, the balance sheet won't balance.

definition.description: Retained earnings = sum of M-2 ending balances

assertions.title: Â§1245 gain splits correctly to K9 + Line 4
assertions.description: For a Â§1245 asset sold at a gain with depreciation: ordinary recapture goes to Page 1 Line 4, Section 1231 excess goes to K9.

assertions.title: QBI W-2 wages = Line 7 + Line 8
assertions.description: Section 199A W-2 wages auto-calculates from officer compensation (Line 7) plus salaries and wages (Line 8).
assertions.bug_reference: Mar 30 2026 â€” QBI W-2 wages was manual input, now computed

assertions.title: AMT depreciation halved on disposal (half-year convention)
assertions.description: When a 200DB HY asset is sold in a year after placement, AMT current depreciation must be halved for the half-year disposal convention, same as regular depreciation.

definition.description: AMT disposal convention must match regular disposal convention
